name: Socotra Insurance Core Platform API
what_it_does: Socotra insurance core platform REST API for insurers, MGAs, and insurance technology companies to manage policy administration, billing, claims, and product configuration through Socotra's cloud-native insurance core system — enabling automated policy lifecycle management, premium billing, claims processing, and insurance product configuration through a modern API-first insurance core platform designed to replace legacy policy admin systems. Enables AI agents to manage policy creation for insurance policy issuance automation, handle endorsement for policy modification automation, access billing for premium collection and invoice automation, retrieve claims for insurance claim lifecycle automation, manage renewal for automated policy renewal automation, handle product configuration for insurance product parameter automation, access document generation for policy document creation automation, retrieve reporting for insurance portfolio analytics automation, manage agent portal for distribution channel management automation, and integrate Socotra with insurance distribution, claims, and reinsurance platforms for end-to-end insurance core system automation.
use_cases: Managing insurance policy lifecycle (issuance, endorsements, renewals, cancellations) for carrier core system automation agents
Processing insurance billing and premium collection for policy administration platform automation agents
Administering claims from first notice of loss through settlement for insurance carrier automation agents
Configuring new insurance products and coverage parameters through Socotra's product model for MGA automation agents
not_for: Consumer insurance shopping (Socotra is core system infrastructure, not consumer-facing portal)
Investment and life insurance (Socotra focuses on P&C, specialty, and short-tail lines)
Actuarial pricing modeling (Socotra is policy administration, not actuarial or rate development)
best_when: An insurance carrier, MGA, or InsurTech company wanting AI agents to automate policy administration, billing, and claims processing through Socotra's modern cloud-native insurance core system API.
avoid_when: CARRIER OR MGA IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRED: Socotra is an enterprise insurance core system requiring implementation project; automated instant API access assumption creates implementation_required; automated must complete Socotra implementation engagement before production use. INSURANCE REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Insurance policy administration must comply with state DOI regulations; automated non-compliant policy management assumption creates regulatory violation per state; automated must implement state-specific coverage forms and regulatory requirements. PRODUCT CONFIGURATION IS COMPLEX: Socotra's product model requires actuarial and insurance expertise to configure coverage parameters correctly; automated configuration-without-insurance-expertise assumption creates incorrectly priced or structured products; automated must involve licensed insurance professionals in product configuration. CUSTOM INTEGRATION REQUIRED: Socotra integrates with external systems (payment processors, document management, BI tools) through configuration; automated out-of-the-box everything assumption misses integration configuration requirements.

auth.notes: Socotra uses OAuth2 + API token for platform API authentication. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2014 by Dan Woods and Adam Irving. Products: Policy administration, billing, claims, product studio, agent portal, analytics. SDKs: None public. Cloud-native SaaS core system. Backed by Insight Partners, Two Sigma Ventures, and others. Competes with Guidewire Cloud and Duck Creek for P&C insurance core system.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for implementation partners; production requires carrier/MGA implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SaaS subscription based on premium volume; implementation services; support tiers
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. SaaS insurance core. Premium-volume pricing. Cloud-native. P&C insurance infrastructure.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; policy and claims APIs throttled per tenant

known_agent_gotchas: IMPLEMENTATION PROJECT REQUIRED: Socotra is an enterprise core system requiring professional implementation; automated instant core system access assumption creates a months-long implementation gap; automated must plan for Socotra implementation project before production API use

TENANT-SPECIFIC CONFIGURATION: Socotra is a multi-tenant SaaS where each carrier's product model is unique; automated generic API assumption creates tenant-specific configuration differences; automated must understand the specific carrier's Socotra product configuration before automating

POLICY STATE MACHINE IS COMPLEX: Socotra policies follow a state machine (created → quoted → bound → in-force → cancelled/renewed); automated direct-to-bound assumption creates invalid_state_transition; automated must follow Socotra's policy lifecycle state machine

DOCUMENT GENERATION IS ASYNC: Socotra document generation (policy docs, ID cards) may be async; automated synchronous document assumption creates polling requirement; automated must implement async document generation with polling or webhook for completion

PRODUCT CONFIGURATION REQUIRES INSURANCE EXPERTISE: Socotra's Product Studio requires actuarial and legal insurance expertise to configure correctly; automated configuration-without-expertise assumption creates incorrectly structured insurance products; automated must involve licensed insurance professionals
agent_readiness.security_notes: Insurance core system. State DOI, SOC2, CCPA, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Policy administration and insurance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Insurance core system. State DOI, SOC2, CCPA. OAuth2. US/EU. Policy and insurance administration data.
